prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Alright, listen up.

The hardest part is already over. You’ve wrestled with it in your head all morning. You’ve danced around it, you’ve felt that weight. That’s the resistance talking, and it’s loudest right before you begin.

Now, you’re going to turn the volume down. You don’t need to crush the whole thing. You just need to start. One small, focused action. Open the document. Write one sentence. Take the first step. That’s it.

You’ve handled hard things before. You have the ability, you just need to engage it. Momentum is waiting for you on the other side of that first move.

So take a deep breath. Set a timer for 25 minutes. And go. **The version of you an hour from now will be so grateful you started.**

Now, go make that future you proud. You’ve got this.
